title: Glowing Anatomy Overlay
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for photoreal sports and wellness images with glowing anatomy, biomechanical stress, breathing, and performance-data overlays.

zh-CN.title: Glowing Anatomy Overlay · 霓虹解剖
zh-CN.description: 霓虹解剖主题：在跑者、泳者、骑行者等实拍运动画面上叠加心率、呼吸、肌肉激活、关节应力和数据感图层。
